---
title: "Coffee leaf rust spread and tipping points"
date: "2022"
category: "transformation"
image: ../_images/coffee-rust.jpg
toc: false
listing:
  - id: pubs
    include:
      project: "coffee-rust"
    template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: ../../publications/**/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 30
    fields: [title, journ, author,url_source,year]
    field-types:
      author: string
format:
  html:
    metadata:
      author: false
      date: false
      description: false
---

I applied a tipping point indicator from engineering to understand the spatiotemporal dynamics of annual resurgences of the coffee leaf rust (Hemileia vastatrix) in a Mexican farm (Li et al. 2022, Sci Rep).

## Related Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
